mapper.update: UPDATE tb_book SET delete_yn = 'Y', delete_date = NOW() WHERE book_no = #{bookNo}
mapper.select: SELECT b.book_no, b.book_title, b.book_author, b.book_publisher, b.regist_date, b.delete_yn, b.delete_date, COUNT(i.item_no) AS total_stock, SUM(CASE WHEN i.item_status = 'AVAILABLE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS available_stock FROM tb_book b LEFT JOIN tb_book_item i ON b.book_no = i.book_no AND i.delete_yn = 'N' WHERE b.book_no = #{bookNo} AND b.delete_yn = 'N' GROUP BY b.book_no, b.book_title, b.book_author, b.book_publisher, b.regist_date, b.delete_yn, b.delete_date

SELECT b.book_no, b.book_title, b.book_author, b.book_publisher, b.regist_date, COUNT(i.item_no) AS total_stock, SUM(CASE WHEN i.item_status = 'AVAILABLE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS available_stock FROM tb_book b LEFT JOIN tb_book_item i ON b.book_no = i.book_no AND i.delete_yn = 'N' WHERE b.delete_yn = 'N'
AND b.book_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND b.book_author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND b.book_publisher LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
GROUP BY b.book_no, b.book_title, b.book_author, b.book_publisher, b.regist_date ORDER BY b.book_no DESC LIMIT #{firstIndex}, #{pageUnit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_book WHERE delete_yn = 'N'
AND book_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND book_author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND book_publisher LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_book_item SET delete_yn = 'Y', delete_date = NOW() WHERE book_no = #{bookNo} AND delete_yn = 'N'
